title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Narayana Health Digital
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Narayana Health Digital! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
